meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Bridge the 'no portfolio' gap as a founder. Use this intermediate checklist to design, build, and ship high-converting SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle, pivot from building static mockups to shipping functional, high-fidelity SaaS prototypes. Use Antigravity to generate UI components rapidly and Claude Code to iterate on backend logic. By focusing on solving real user pain points, you transform your technical debt into a tangible revenue-generating asset.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that nobody cares about your resume; they care about your shipping velocity. You are stuck in the 'no portfolio' trap, watching competitors capture market share while you struggle to articulate your vision. The friction between a brilliant idea and a deployed product is the graveyard of failed startups.

It is time to stop designing for 'what-if' and start engineering for 'what-is'. By leveraging AI-native workflows, you can compress months of UI/UX design and boilerplate coding into days. This isn't about pretty pixels; it's about building a machine that proves your worth to investors and customers alike.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Before touching code, define a single, high-value user flow. Focus on a specific business problem that users will pay to solve.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-fidelity SaaS landing page layout for a [Insert Niche] tool. Include a hero section with a clear CTA, a feature grid, and a pricing table. Style it with a modern, minimalist dark mode aesthetic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Analyze the business model for [Niche] and suggest a 3-step user onboarding flow.'

steps.title: Rapid UI Generation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold your front-end components. Ensure the design system is consistent to maintain professional quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive React dashboard component library including sidebar navigation, data table with search, and user profile card. Use Tailwind CSS for styling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Review the generated UI components and ensure accessibility standards are met for mobile responsiveness.'

steps.title: Architect the Backend Logic
steps.description: Connect your UI to a functional backend. Focus on data persistence and user authentication as the foundation for your MVP.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Express.js API boilerplate with endpoints for user authentication and data CRUD operations, connected to a Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Implement JWT authentication and secure the API routes with middleware.'

steps.title: Integrate AI Features
steps.description: Add an AI-driven differentiator to your product. This is what separates a boilerplate app from a market-leading SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer in Node.js that interfaces with the OpenAI API to analyze user-inputted data and return actionable business insights.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Optimize the prompt engineering in the backend service to reduce latency and improve response accuracy.'

steps.title: Iterative Deployment and Refinement
steps.description: Deploy to a staging environment and use Claude Code to perform a final audit on performance and security before launch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a deployment script for Vercel that includes environment variable management and build optimization steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Run a security audit on the codebase and suggest performance optimizations for the production build.'

pro_tips: Always build your UI components as atomic, reusable units to allow for rapid pivoting during early-stage user feedback.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; a well-documented codebase is a massive signal of maturity to future technical co-founders.
Prioritize 'Time to First Value' (TTFV) over feature density; a single feature that works perfectly is worth ten that are buggy.
Leverage environment variables from day one to ensure your production secrets never touch your version control history.
Treat your AI prompts as part of your source code; maintain a library of successful prompts to maintain consistency as your product scales.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, spend the next 48 hours getting it in front of 50 potential users. Collect feedback, iterate using your new AI workflow, and document your growth metrics to build your reputation.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a product that proves your value. Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. The tools are ready, the market is waiting, and your portfolio starts with the code you ship today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
